name: ps
description: Display information about currently running processes on the system

options.label: Show all processes
options.description: Select all processes on the system, not just those owned by the current user

options.label: Full format
options.description: Display full-format listing with additional columns like UID, PPID, and start time

options.label: User
options.description: Show processes belonging to the specified user

examples.label: Show all processes in full format
Show processes for a specific user
Show current user's processes in full format
Show processes for the www-data user
